center.name: 巴林戈湖
center.summary: 巴林戈湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括冠翠鸟、African grey flycatcher、White-browed sparrow-weaver等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African grey flycatcher, grayish flycatcher, or large flycatcher (Bradornis microrhynchus) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that occurs in parts of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: melanorhynchus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | image2 = White-browed Sparrow Weaver (Plocepasser mahali) (022A-WA03044X0028-0011M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in southwest Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Plocepasser mahali | authority = Smith, 1836 }} The white-browed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser mahali) is a predominantly brown, sparrow-sized bird found throughout central and north-central southern Africa. It is found in groups of two to eleven individuals consisting of one breeding pair and other non-reproductive individuals

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: taha) displaying near Lake Baringo, Kenya, and a captive female (nominate race) | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Euplectes | species = afer | authority = (Gmelin, 1789) | synonyms = Taha afer }} The yellow-crowned bishop (Euplectes afer) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to Africa south of the Sahara. It is highly sexually dimorphic in its breeding season, during which the male adopts a distinctive yellow and black plumage, contrasting with the female's predominantly brown coloration

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cristatus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | genus = Corythornis | species = cristatus | authority = (Pallas, 1764) |subdivision_ranks=Subspecies | subdivision = See text | synonyms = Alcedo cristata }} The malachite kingfisher (Corythornis cristatus) is a river kingfisher which is widely distributed in Africa south of the Sahara
